description: CUDA version requirement bumped to 12.1 for BF16 but CI node has CUDA 11.8

ground_truth.root_cause: cuda_check.py was updated to require CUDA >= 12.1 for BF16 tensor core support, but the CI runner has CUDA 11.8 installed. The assertion fails immediately at environment validation.
ground_truth.recommended_fix: Update CI runner Docker image to nvidia/cuda:12.1.0-devel-ubuntu22.04, or gate the BF16 path behind a runtime capability check (torch.cuda.is_bf16_supported()) rather than a hard assertion.
